calendar.matters:
Notice Of Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DONALD R. MOODY's Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal filed November 4, 2015. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Continued To Nov-10-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nina Decker, Esq., (408-919-0088) of The Mlnarik Law group, Inc. for Petitioner/Moving party Donald. R. Moody.
Fayedine Coulter, Esq., (510-788-4395) for Respondent/Opposing party Diana Theresa Felix.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
PETITIONER DONALD R. MOODY's Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling is continued to November 10, 2015 pending the result of the reverse mortgage. Counsel for the petitioner reports to the Court that the bankruptcy stay has been lifted and Department 501 has jurisdiction of the case. Counsel for the respondent requests a sixty day stay or continuance pending the result of the reverse mortgage. Parties waive notice. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nina Decker, Esq. (408-919-0088) of The Minarik Law Group for Petitioner/Moving party DONALD R. MOODY through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

Hearing is held. Petitioner reports the status of bankruptcy. The bankruptcy has been dismissed on July 17. However, there is a pending motion. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER DONALD R. MOODY's Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling is continued to September 30, 2015 at 9:30 am in Dept. 501 to wait for the ruling on the pending bankruptcy motion. Petitioner to send notice to opposing party. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar May-27-2015 Continued To Aug-27-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Nina C. Decker (408-919-0088) appearing through CourtCall for Petitioner and moving party Donald Moody.

Hearing Held. Atty. Nina Decker informed the court that the parties are still in bankrupty court awaiting the deadline for the debitor to create a payment plan to have the debt paid off within six month. Ms. Decker request a continuance.

Court having reviwed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: PETITIONER DONALD R. MOODY'S Notice Of Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling. The Court grants plaintff's request for a continuance. This matter is continued to August 27, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 501. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Continued To May-27-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Atty. Nina Decker (408-919-0088) appearing for Petitioner and moving party Donald Moody. No appearance by Respondent.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
PETITIONER DONALD R. MOODY's Notice Of Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling is continued to May 27, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 501 for bankrupty status. Petitoner to send notice. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk:N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Feb-25-2015 Continued To Mar-25-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER DONALD R. MOODY's Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling is continued to March 25, 2015 for bankruptcy status report. Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Nov-24-2014 Continued To Feb-25-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Philip Felix appears on behalf of his mother Defendant and opposing party, Diana Theresa Felix.
No other appearance on the matter.

Respondent files a stay of proceedings on 11/24/14. The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER DONALD R. MOODY'S Application For Order Of Sale Of Dwelling is
continued to 02/25/15 for status report re: bankruptcy. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
